homeHeroLine1.zh: 构建更好的浏览器扩展

homeHeroTagline.en: Accelerate your browser extension development. Built on Rsbuild — fast, simple, and free.
homeHeroTagline.zh: 加速你的浏览器插件开发。基于 Rsbuild，快速，简单，自由。

homeFeaturesSectionSubtitle.en: Addfox makes extension development fast and predictable.
homeFeaturesSectionSubtitle.zh: Addfox 让扩展开发更快、更可预期。

homeBlock1Desc.en: Run addfox dev for watch + Hot Reload; extension loads in the browser with ultra-fast HMR for both content_script and background.
homeBlock1Desc.zh: 运行 addfox dev 即 watch + Hot Reload；扩展在浏览器中加载，content_script 与 background 均能极速HMR。

homeBlock2Desc.en: Build automatically outputs a zip file; consistent Rsbuild pipeline for production.
homeBlock2Desc.zh: 使用 build 将自动打包 zip 格式；与生产一致的 Rsbuild 流水线。

homeFeaturesRow1Subtitle.en: Hot reload, multi-browser support, and minimal config to help you ship extensions faster.
homeFeaturesRow1Subtitle.zh: 热更新、多浏览器支持与极简配置，助你更快交付扩展。

homeFeaturesRow2Subtitle.en: Structured meta, terminal error output, and Skills — so AI can understand and work with your extension.
homeFeaturesRow2Subtitle.zh: 结构化 meta、终端错误输出与 Skills，让 AI 能理解并扩展你的扩展。

homeFeature1Title.en: Same experience in dev and production
homeFeature1Title.zh: 一流的开发与生产体验

homeFeature1Details.en: Built on Rsbuild. Full bundle mode ensures consistent dev and build experience without sacrificing ultimate performance.
homeFeature1Details.zh: 底层基于 Rsbuild。Full bundle 模式保证开发与打包体验一致且不丢失极致的性能。

homeFeature2Details.en: Vanilla, Vue, React, Preact, Svelte, Solid, or React+UnoCSS — use what you like.
homeFeature2Details.zh: 你可以用 Vanilla，也可以使用 Vue、React、Preact、Svelte、Solid 或 React+UnoCSS 等框架。

homeFeature3Details.en: Install addfox, add addfox.config.ts at the root, and start — no complex setup.
homeFeature3Details.zh: 安装 addfox 后，在根目录添加 addfox.config.ts 即可开始，无需复杂的配置即可完成插件开发。

homeFeature4Details.en: Support for mainstream Chromium-based browsers and Firefox. Auto-detects browser default install path and launches without configuration.
homeFeature4Details.zh: 支持主流 Chromium 系浏览器和 Firefox。无需配置即可自动识别浏览器默认安装地址并启动。

homeFeature5Details.en: Dedicated Reloader controls extension updates — not only fast, but both content_script and background achieve ultra-fast HMR.
homeFeature5Details.zh: 使用独立 Reloader 控制扩展更新，不仅快速，content_script 和 background 均能实现极速HMR。

homeFeature6Details.en: Built-in createContentUI method for easy integration of Iframe, ShadowDom, and native content.
homeFeature6Details.zh: 提供了内置的 createContentUI 方法，可轻松集成 Iframe、ShadowDom 和原生内容。

homeFeature7Details.en: Enable terminal error output with --debug. Capture all extension errors without browser DevTools, so you can Ask AI directly in any editor.
homeFeature7Details.zh: 使用 --debug 时启用终端错误输出。无需在浏览器操作即可掌握插件所有报错信息，方便你在任何 Editor 中直接 Ask AI。

homeFeatureAiMetadataTitle.zh: llms.txt 和 markdown 元信息支持

homeFeatureAiMetadataDetails.en: Provides clear extension info, error details, and prompts to help AI agents develop.
homeFeatureAiMetadataDetails.zh: 提供明确的插件信息、错误信息和 prompts，帮助 AI agent 开发。

homeFeatureBundleAnalysisDetails.en: Built-in support for Rsdoctor and Rstest to quickly complete bundle analysis, unit and e2e testing.
homeFeatureBundleAnalysisDetails.zh: 内置支持 Rsdoctor 与 Rstest，可快速完成打包分析及单元、e2e 测试。

homeFeature8Details.en: Build automatically outputs an extension zip package for easy installation and distribution.
homeFeature8Details.zh: 构建时自动输出扩展 zip 包，便于安装与分发。

homeFeature9Details.en: Supports file-based auto entry discovery and entry field configuration. Maximum flexibility for complex projects.
homeFeature9Details.zh: 支持基于文件自动识别入口，也支持通过 entry 字段配置入口。最大程度为复杂项目提供灵活性。

homeFeatureMetaDetails.en: Outputs structured meta for easy consumption by AI and tools.
homeFeatureMetaDetails.zh: 输出结构化 meta，便于 AI 与工具消费。

homeFeatureSkillsDetails.en: Extensible Skills to support Agents and automation.
homeFeatureSkillsDetails.zh: 可扩展的 Skills，支持 Agent 与自动化。

creatorSaysContent.en: I'm Gomi, the creator of Video Roll, a browser extension featured on both Chrome Web Store and Edge with over 35K users. Despite its success, I still felt unsatisfied with the extension development experience. After trying Parcel, Vite, and other tools, I decided to tackle the pain points myself. Even with excellent solutions like WXT and Plasmo available, I didn't want to reinvent the wheel. The speed of Rsbuild and the AI-friendly development paradigm fascinated me, so I created Addfox.
creatorSaysContent.zh: 我是 Gomi，也是浏览器插件 Video Roll 的作者。尽管我开发的插件在 Chrome Web Store 和 Edge 上都成为了精选插件，用户量也超过了 35K，但开发浏览器插件的过程中，我依然感觉到不满足。在尝试了 Parcel、Vite 等开发工具后，我决定尝试解决一些插件开发中的痛点。即使业界已经存在 WXT、Plasmo 这种非常优秀和完善的解决方案，但我坚决不会重复造轮子。基于 Rsbuild 的速度和 AI 友好的开发范式，让我着迷，于是我创造了 Addfox。

faqSubtitle.en: Quick answers to common questions about Addfox
faqSubtitle.zh: 关于 Addfox 的常见问题快速解答

faqAnswer1.en: Yes, Addfox is fully open source under the MIT license. You can view the source code on GitHub, contribute to the project, or fork it for your own needs.
faqAnswer1.zh: 是的，Addfox 采用 MIT 协议完全开源。你可以在 GitHub 上查看源代码、为项目贡献代码，或者根据需要进行 Fork。

faqAnswer2.en: Currently, Addfox focuses on Chromium-based browsers (Chrome, Edge, Arc, Brave, etc.) and Firefox. Safari support is not available at this time due to its different extension API and packaging requirements.
faqAnswer2.zh: 目前 Addfox 专注于 Chromium 系浏览器（Chrome、Edge、Arc、Brave 等）和 Firefox。由于 Safari 的扩展 API 和打包要求不同，暂不支持 Safari。

faqQuestion3.en: Does it support mainstream frontend frameworks?
faqQuestion3.zh: 是否支持主流前端框架？

faqAnswer3.en: Absolutely! Addfox is framework-agnostic and works with React, Vue, Preact, Svelte, Solid, and vanilla JavaScript/TypeScript. You can use your preferred framework with minimal configuration.
faqAnswer3.zh: 当然支持！Addfox 是框架无关的，支持 React、Vue、Preact、Svelte、Solid 以及原生 JavaScript/TypeScript。你可以使用喜欢的框架，只需极少的配置。

faqQuestion4.en: What are the differences compared to WXT/Plasmo/Extension.js?
faqQuestion4.zh: 与 WXT/Plasmo/Extension.js 的区别是什么？

faqAnswer4.en: WXT, Plasmo, and Extension.js are all excellent choices that have greatly advanced the extension development ecosystem. WXT brings the power of Vite and a well-designed plugin system; Plasmo offers comprehensive cloud integration and a polished developer experience; Extension.js provides simplicity and ease of use. Addfox takes a different approach: built on Rsbuild for exceptional build speed, designed specifically for AI-assisted development with structured metadata and terminal error output, and offering maximum flexibility through minimal conventions—you can organize your code however you prefer while still getting out-of-the-box HMR and multi-browser support.
faqAnswer4.zh: WXT、Plasmo 和 Extension.js 都是非常优秀的框架，它们极大地推动了浏览器扩展开发生态的发展。WXT 带来了 Vite 的强大性能和精心设计的插件系统；Plasmo 提供了完善的云服务集成和出色的开发体验；Extension.js 则以简洁易用著称。Addfox 选择了不同的路径：基于 Rsbuild 构建以获得极致的构建速度；专为 AI 辅助开发设计，提供结构化元数据和终端错误输出；通过最小化的约定给予你最大的灵活性——你可以按自己喜欢的方式组织代码，同时享受开箱即用的热更新和多浏览器支持。
